conditions: Tin Ore is a pre-Hardmode ore . It spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers , and occasionally on the surface . Tin Ore also has a small chance to appear as a bonus drop from slimes .
TNT Barrels are naturally generated in No Traps and Zenith worlds, in particularly large numbers in the Jungle Temple .

notes: The Toolbelt is a construction accessory that can be purchased from the Goblin Tinkerer for 10 GC . While equipped, it grants +1 placement range , but not tool range.

conditions: Topaz is a gem found within the Underground and Cavern layers of a world. They are obtained by breaking special blocks that have noticeable yellow-orange gemstones embedded in it. They can also be extracted from Silt , Slush , or Desert Fossil by putting them in an Extractinator . Rarely, Topaz can be found in bulk in its own Gemstone Cave mini biome, or in one that contains all of the other gems as well (besides Amber ). Topaz is the second-least valuable gem available, being able to craft the Sandgun , a type of ranged weapon , along with the rest of the items that usually all gems have counterparts of.

The Toucan is a critter that spawns in the Jungle during the daytime . It also has a small chance of spawning upon shaking a Mahogany tree during the day. It may turn hostile to players with negative luck ; see hostile critter for details . The Toucan has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.

The Toy Sled is a Hardmode pet-summoning item that spawns a Baby Snowman that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Baby Snowman rides in a toy sled to catch up to them. The Toy Sled has a 1/20 (5%) chance of being dropped by Ice Mimics .

notes: The Tragic Umbrella is a pre-Hardmode shortsword and held item that can be purchased from the Clothier for 10 GC while in a Graveyard . It functions identical to the standard Umbrella , aside from dealing higher damage.

conditions: The Trash Can is a storage item which has 40 storage slots. They essentially serve the same purpose as Chests , only having the appearance of a trash can. Trash Cans can only be harvested when empty. When given a signal, they collect nearby dropped items in a 192 pixel radius. [ 1 ]
Trout are a type of fish which are found plentifully by fishing in the Ocean in the Sky or Surface layers.

The Truffle Worm is a rare Hardmode critter and boss-summoning item that spawns in the underground Glowing Mushroom biome . It summons Duke Fishron when used as bait . It can only be used in the Ocean , at any time.
Tuna are a type of fish which are found commonly by fishing in the Ocean in the Sky or Surface layers.

Tungsten Ore is a pre-Hardmode ore . It spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers , and occasionally on Floating Islands . Tungsten Ore also has a small chance to appear as a bonus drop from slimes .

The Jungle Turtle is a harmless critter that spawns in or near a body of water on the surface Jungle at any time. Like its Forest counterpart , it moves slowly on land and swims at the surface of water. The Jungle Turtle has only 5 health and no defense , and can be damaged by other enemies and players.
The Umbrella is a pre-Hardmode shortsword and held item. It can be found in surface Chests and can also be purchased for 1 GC from the Skeleton Merchant during a Waning Gibbous .

notes: In addition to being crafted, Unholy Arrows are dropped by the Eye of Cthulhu . Furthermore, they can be purchased from the Arms Dealer at night for 40 CC once the Eater of Worlds or Brain of Cthulhu has been defeated. During Hardmode , they become available during the day as well.
The Fake Unicorn Horn is a vanity accessory purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 GC 50 SC .

conditions: The Unlucky Yarn is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Black Cat that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Black Cat flies on a broom to catch up with them. The Unlucky Yarn has a 1/150 (0.67%) chance of being obtained from Goodie Bags during the Halloween seasonal event .

chanceText: 1% (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 0.5% (Old-gen console and 3DS versions)

conditions: The Vampire Knives are always found in the Dungeon 's Crimson Chest , which can only be unlocked with a Crimson Key after Plantera has been defeated.

notes: The Sakura Sapling is a type of seed that grows into a Sakura tree , which is a tree that can also spawn naturally in Forest biomes , when planted. Its appearance is purely decorative and it functions identically to regular forest trees. Sakura Saplings can be purchased from the Zoologist for 1 GC once the Bestiary is 30% completed (164 entries).

The Yellow Willow Sapling is a type of seed that grows into a Yellow Willow tree , which is a tree that can also spawn naturally in Forest biomes , when planted. Its appearance is purely decorative and it functions identically to regular forest trees. Yellow Willow Saplings can be purchased from the Zoologist for 1 GC once the Bestiary is 30% completed (164 entries).

conditions: Variegated Lardfish are a type of fish which are found uncommonly by fishing in the Underground Jungle . They are used to craft Seafood Dinners and Summoning Potions .

notes: The Vial of Venom is a Hardmode crafting material purchased from the Witch Doctor for 15 SC each, after Plantera has been defeated.

conditions: The Vicious Mushroom is a type of mushroom found on grass in the Crimson , where they can be cut and collected with a single swing of any weapon or tool . Vicious Mushroom can only grow when there are proper walls behind the soil block, or no walls at all.

The Vile Mushroom is a type of mushroom found on grass in the Corruption , where they can be cut and collected with a single swing from any weapon or tool . Vile Mushroom can only grow when there are proper walls behind the soil block, or no walls at all.

The Vilethorn is a pre-Hardmode wand . It has a 1/5 (20%) chance of being obtained from destroying Shadow Orbs found in the Corruption or a 1/5 (20%) chance from Corrupt Crates (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) and Defiled Crates (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) , which are fished in the Corruption. When used, it extends a 15-tile-long thorn from the player's position, which passes through blocks , pierces infinite enemies , and hits rapidly for up to six times per enemy. The thorn lasts roughly 1.5 seconds, with each individual segment lasting 1 second.

notes: Vulkelf Ears are a vanity item purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 2 GC 50 SC .

conditions: Unlike equipment buff items , the War Table must be placed in order to activate the buff. It can be mined with a pickaxe or drill and picked up again, even while the buff is active, which will not cancel the buff. Placement is only dependent on an adequate space of 5×4 tiles being available.
